session_summary: Full-stack MVP build, auth migration, UI stabilization, trust/reviews, media uploads, deployment readiness, and build-state recovery.

prompts.title: Initial MVP Build
prompts.user_request: Build runnable farmer marketplace MVP with Next.js + Express + MongoDB, OTP login, listings, cart, orders, role flows.
work_completed: Scaffolded client/server structure
Implemented models: User, Product, Listing, Cart, Order
Implemented JWT auth routes and protected APIs
Implemented frontend pages: login, home, product detail, sell, cart, orders
Added baseline i18n, Tailwind, React Query, RHF, Zod

prompts.title: API Base / OTP JSON Parse Fix
prompts.user_request: Fix frontend OTP JSON parse error from HTML response; enforce absolute API base and defensive parsing.
work_completed: Hardened client/lib/api.js with API_BASE_URL guard
Added content-type checks before JSON parsing
Ensured API base comes from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
Created client/.env.local
Restarted dev server and verified /login route health

prompts.title: Auth Migration + UI Upgrade
prompts.user_request: Remove OTP/phone auth and replace with email/password + JWT + bcrypt; improve UI/UX and component consistency.
work_completed: Migrated backend auth to register/login/logout
Updated User model to email/passwordHash
Added role-safe user dashboard APIs
Created reusable UI components and responsive navigation
Rebuilt login/register/home/product/sell/cart/orders/profile pages
Added Headless UI + Lucide
Updated docs and dev context

prompts.title: Login/Signup Required Field Fix
prompts.user_request: Fix login/signup data fill and required field issues.
work_completed: Fixed RHF integration by adding forwardRef to Input and Select
Added required + autocomplete attributes on auth forms

prompts.title: Next.js Missing Chunk Recovery
prompts.user_request: Fix Cannot find module './427.js' during Next dev startup.
work_completed: Stopped locked Node processes
Deleted .next, node_modules, package-lock
Cleaned npm cache
Reinstalled dependencies
Restarted dev server and verified login page response
artifacts: build state reset only (no source changes required)

prompts.title: A+B+C+D Hardening Pass
prompts.user_request: Implement stabilization, trust/reviews, media uploads, deployment readiness, plus realistic seed data.
work_completed: Added Review model, controller, routes
Added seller trust aggregation (avg rating, review count, completed orders)
Added product image upload with multer validation (type/size/max files)
Added robust validation for expired listings, invalid quantities, empty carts
Added frontend review submission after completed order
Added image preview/gallery/fallback in cards and product detail
Added seed script with realistic users/products/orders/review
Updated .env.example, README, and devctx version

prompts.title: Create .devctx Daily Context
prompts.user_request: Create .devctx and save complete context of today's prompts.
work_completed: Created .devctx directory
Saved dated prompt-level execution log
